texto: There was one question, however, which Inciarte had asked him and he could not answer. Why was it that he had lived while others had died? What purpose had God in making this selection? What sense could be made out of it? ‘None,’ replied Father Andrés. ‘There are times when the will of God cannot be understood by our human intelligence. There are things which in all humility we must accept as a mystery.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Piers Paul Read que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “There was one question, however, which Inciarte had asked him and he could not answer. Why was it…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, god, humility, com foco em humility e mystery.
